text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the well wishes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
J-Just from a "thank you"? Keep it together! 
You still have more to say, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ungh… uh-huh… Rubae! Wanna party 
tonight? I put a lot of tho—

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry, but I have a dinner to 
attend tonight. This time of year tends 
to get rather busy, so I would appreciate it 
if you'd schedule plans ahead of time.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
All right, then I call dibs on next year!!
Today one year from now — all mine, please!
There, scheduled! It's a date!!

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
…I cannot make any guarantees, 
but I'll tell my butler.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, she's fine, don't mind her. She's just 
really happy. Good for you, Helios!
